title: MYAYD DC50 DC50i Washable Pre Motor & Post Motor HEPA Filter Kit Compatible With Dyson DC50 DC50i Vacuum Cleaners, Multi Floor Total Clean Vacuums, Compatible Part# 965081-01&965080-01
features: 🧹【Compatible with DC50】Specifically designed for Dyson DC50 vacuum cleaners, these filters ensure optimal performance and compatibility. They seamlessly integrate with your existing vacuum, providing a perfect fit for efficient filtration and uninterrupted suction power.

🧹【Easy to Install】No tools required! These replacement filters are designed for effortless installation, simply remove the old filters and snap the new ones into place. This makes maintenance a breeze, allowing you to spend less time cleaning and more time enjoying your clean home.

🧹【High Filtration Efficiency】These filters are designed with high-efficiency particulate air (HEPA) technology, capturing up to 99.97% of particles as small as 0.3 microns. This ensures cleaner air and a healthier living environment by trapping dust mites, pollen, pet dander, and other allergens.
🧹【Reused & Washable】As replacement filter that can be reused and washable for Dyson DC50 DC50i .Filtration of micro-dust and its effect on inhaled air.

🧹【Service】Please check the compatible model before purchasing. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We offer our customers 100% satisfactory service and answer your questions within 24 hours.
description: Specifications: Color: Blue Size: Length: 7.5cm Width: 3cm Height: 4cm Material: ABS+Fiber Model: HEPA#965081-01 The Package Includes: Product x 2
